Buildforfun blog posts!

Favourite quotes

Quote author or Concept Quote
Charlie Munger Be consistently not stupid. Instead of trying to be very intelligent.
Peter Attia If it comes in a package you’re probably better off not eating it. If your ancestors couldn’t have eaten it even 200 years ago, it’s probably not worth eating.
Steve Jobs Look in the mirror and ask yourself if today was the last day of my life, Would I want to do what I’m about to do today. Whenever the answer is no too many days in a row. I know I need to change something. Remembering that you are going to die, is the best way I know to avoid the trap of thinking you have something to lose. Death is the destination we all share. Death is the best invention. It clears out the old to bring in the new. Your time is limited. Don’t waste your time living someone elses life. Don’t let the noise of other peoples opinions drown out your own inner voice. Have the courage to follow your heart and intuition. They somehow already know what you truly want to become.
Jung Sung If you skip thinking about how you represent your learning, you’re skipping the learning.
Naval Ravikant The past is fiction. Don’t spend anytime thinking about the past. It doesn’t exist. It’s a waste of time. There is no reason to sort out your past. The past is in your head. The present is all that exists. Anytime your not in your present is a waste of time. How do you know you are getting the most out of every moment? You can be in flow - you were engaged in a task at the end of your capability. You want to be in flow in every moment. Fully aware and present. Everything you do - you are engaged and your mind isn’t running around. Your mind has to be in your control. Be aware of your monkey mind when it’s out of control. Be self aware in every moment. Be fully engaged on anything you do
Andrew Schulz Your obessions outweighs the insecurity of being an outsider
Marcus Aurelius What stands in the way, becomes the way
Ralph Waldo Emerson What you do speaks so loudly I cannot hear what you say.
HealthyGamer You don’t exist beyond today. That your life is actually a multiplayer game where random people are waking up in your life and taking your life one day at a time. You are a random person living this life one day at a time. What do you love to do? You love to screw over tomorrow you. You wake up tomorrow and who do you get mad at? You get mad at the dude that came before you. Dammit why didn’t that person do what they needed to do. You don’t recognise that you only get to live for this moment in time.
Mark Manson Confidence does not come from an expectation of success, it comes with the comfort with failure.
Mark Manson Nothing meaningful in life is easy. Nothing easy is meaningful
Seneca We are often more frightened than hurt, and we suffer more from imagination than from reality.
Marcus Aurelius Today I escaped anxiety. Or no,I discarded it, because it was within me, in my own perceptions not outside.
Marcus Aurelius You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realise this, and you will find strength.
Seneca The primary indication of a well-ordered mind is a man’s ability to remain in one place and linger in his own company.
Marcus Aurelius Receive without pride, let go without attachment.
Chris Hemsworth Eat and sleep well, Challenge my mind and body to new experiences and immerse myself in nature and share this with the people i love.
Austin Kleon Post as though everyone who can read it has the power to fire you.
George Mack If struggling to think creatively about a subject, transform it: Turn a thought into a written idea. A written idea into a drawing. A drawing into an equation. An equation into a conversation. In the process of transforming it:you begin to spot new creative connections.
Chris Williamson Inaction breeds fear, while action breeds courage
Casey Neistat Life is substantiated by the whatever impact or whatever contribution you can make while you are alive. Doing and building things and spending time with family - those are the ways I feel I am contributing. Therefore, I maximise my time to be as effective as possible. Free time is the enemy of progress - free time is not doing. I try and omit that entirely from my life.
Tom Cruise I didn’t grow up with money- I did it all myself. Just study your work and learn. Get up early - 4/5, start before anyone else. I really enjoy working hard. I work 7 days a week - working is a vacation. I rarely take vacations. Life is about learning new things, It’s about challenging yourself.
Lao Tzu A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
Michelangelo I saw the angel in the marble and carved until I set him free. Time is the marble your mind is the chisel, be the angel you carve for your future self.
Seneca It’s not that we have a short time to live, it’s that we waste a lot of it
Casey Neistat Free time is the enemy of progress
German designer Good design is as little as possible
A friend Focus on yourself
A friend Have a PMA (Positive Mental Attitude)
Anne Rice Don’t bend, don’t water it down, don’t try to make it logical. don’t edit your soul according to the fashion. Rather follow your most intense obesseions merciessly.
Naval Ravikant Very often specific knowledge is at the edge of knowledge. It’s also stuff that’s only now being figured out or is really hard to figure out. If you’re not 100 percent into it somebody else who is 100 percent into it will outperform you. And they won’t just outperform you by a little bit—they’ll outperform you by a lot
Richard Feynmann What I cannot create I do not understand
George Mack Their reality was just a poorly designed video game.
Marcus Aurelius Perfection of character is this: to live each day as if it was your last without frenzy without apathy and without pretence
Nassim Taleb You are rich if and only if money you refuse tastes better than money you accept.
Andrej Karpathy I would encourage you to look beyond the established academic game. Think for yourself and from first principles. Do things others don’t do but should.
